title: Peppery Gooey Brazilian Pretzels Gratin
description: A savory brunch delight that marries the buttery crunch of Brazilian-style pretzels with a molten, pepper-infused cheese sauce, finished under a broiler for a caramelized top.

ingredients.name: Brazilian-style pretzel sticks
ingredients.notes: if unavailable, use regular pretzel sticks

instructions: Preheat the oven to 200°C (400°F) and set the top rack 3 inches from the heat source for broiling.
Arrange the pretzel sticks in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
In a bowl, combine shredded mozzarella, cheddar, and cream cheese. Add garlic powder, onion powder, smoked paprika, and black pepper; mix until well blended.
Spread the cheese mixture evenly over the pretzel sticks, ensuring each stick is generously covered.
Drizzle the melted butter over the cheese-coated pretzels for a glossy finish.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes, or until the cheese is bubbling and the pretzels are lightly golden.
Switch the oven to broil, broiling for 2–3 minutes until the top turns a golden brown and slightly crisp. Watch closely to avoid burning.
Remove from the oven, let cool for 2 minutes, then serve immediately while gooey.
